## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on GrowthX's product roadmap, team structure, and upcoming projects for Atlas and Flow.](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is trending towards $10-12M ARR by year-end, positioning well for potential fundraising in October](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Atlas features (e.g. Knowledge Base, Analytics) are key priorities to support growth and client value](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Engineering team has capacity; focus now on coordination and prioritizing impactful projects](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Felipe taking a surf trip next week; team has bandwidth to manage without issues](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)

## Topics

### Business Update & Roadmap

  - [Trending towards $10-12M ARR by December if maintaining 2 kickoffs/week](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Potential fundraising round in October ($30-50M) if hitting targets](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Focus on editorial and simpler programmatic SEO offerings ($10-15k/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Key Atlas features to drive growth: client access, analytics, knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)

### Atlas Project Priorities

  - [Knowledge Base: Upload/tag research docs, templates, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Page Inventory: Tracking content opportunities and competitor monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Analytics Dashboard: Integrate Scrunch data on site mentions/tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Home Dashboard: Implement mocked UI with recent activity, pipeline stats](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)

### Team Structure & Coordination

  - [4 key personas: Atlas users, workflow creators, less technical workflow creators, content team](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Need for better coordination as team grows; considering hiring product management help](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Splitting team: Rails-skilled devs (Felipe, Brad, Pedro) on Atlas; others (Ben, Jean-Pierre, Stefano) on Flow UI/deployment](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)

### Observability & Monitoring

  - [DataDog dashboard created for Atlas & FlowX API monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [Tracking 500 errors, request volume, latency spikes](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
  - [Some latency issues in Flow App still being investigated](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)

### Knowledge Sharing

  - [Planning an all-hands engineering meeting for demos and updates](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Considering lunch & learn video on DataDog dashboard usage](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)

  - [Create lunch & learn video on DataDog dashboard usage](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)

  - [Begin work on prioritized Atlas projects upon Felipe's return](https://fathom.video/share/Y33y5VUMimMghxDZhCXPXQT7BJ9s2dbb?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
